blended.narrative: Hoodoo is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of snowfall of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,239 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 5".
